calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-15-2017 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-26-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Cummins appeared by telephone for Martin Molloy (Petitioner).

The Court noted that it was not aware of any objections and there are no time sheets for Mr. Molloy's extraordinary fees. Mr. Cummins stated that he is not aware of any objections, that Mr. Molloy has a PHD and MBA, that he provided a full statement on how time was spent filing tax returns, that the Petitioner has tracked his time, but did not have enough time to prepare time sheets, that tax returns would not be included in ordinary services and that the Petitioner is willing to receive ordinary fees. Mr. Cummins also stated that the petitioner had authority to proceed with sale of the property without Court authorization, that Probate Code 10500 permits the personal representative to obtain Court supervision for activity he has already authorized to take and that extraordinary fees should be warranted. In addition, Mr. Cummins stated that research fees were incurred by paralegals and office staff at a lower rate, and spoke of time spent on conferences that were held between the attorney and office staff. The First and Final Report on Waiver of Account, etc. is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-05-2017 Continued To Jul-11-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2134 Filbert Street, San Francisco, Ca 94123 Assessor'S Block 0516, Lot 042)
Off Calendar Dec-19-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Siner for (petitioner) Martin Molloy who is present in Court. Joshua Silber (buyer) also present.

The sale was confirmed at $675,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed 11/22/16. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $736,000.00 is required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Ideta. (Not Reported)
